song.title: I Come to Thee, Dear Lord
song.author: Witness Lee, et. al.
song.lyrics: [V1] . D G D I come to Thee, dear Lord. . E7 A My heart doth thirst for Thee. .D Bm G D D7 G Em Of Thee I’d eat, of Thee I’d drink, .D A D Enjoy Thee thoroughly. [V2] Just to behold Thy face, For this my heart doth cry. I deeply long to drink of Thee, My thirst to satisfy. [V3] Thy glorious, radiant face My heart delights to see. Here I’d abide and ne’er depart, Beholding constantly. [V4] In such a fellowship Thou, Lord, art grace to me. My heart and spirit gladdened, filled, I enter rest in Thee. [V5] Lord, I would linger here, Still seeking after Thee. Continue in the word and prayer, ‘Till Thou dost flow thru me.
